zh.Wilton, Roxburghshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭洛包爾維爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Wardlaw於1328年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾維爾頓時，他的父親Henry Wardlaw35歲，母親Mary Stewart11325歲。他於1335年與Margaret de Halkett在蘇格蘭洛包爾維爾頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1398年享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Wardlaw于1328年出生在苏格兰洛包爾維爾頓时，他的父亲Henry Wardlaw35岁，母亲Mary Stewart11325岁。他于1335年与Margaret de Halkett在苏格兰洛包爾維爾頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1398年享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wardlaw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: probably a habitational name from Wardlaw, in Kirkhill, Inverness, which is recorded as Wardelaue in 1202, or perhaps Wardlaw in Ayrs. However, the possibility that the Scottish family is related to the Wardlow family of Wardlow (Derbys) cannot be ruled out. The placenames derive from Old English weard ‘watch’ + hlāw ‘mound, hill’.

variants.name: Wardlow
meanings: English: habitational name from Wardlow in Derbyshire, from Old English weard ‘watch’ + hlāw ‘hill’. Compare Wardlaw .

variants.name: Warden
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Anglo-Norman French wardein, Old French gardein ‘one who keeps guard, a warden’, i.e. a gate-keeper, porter, or sentinel.

English: habitational name from any of various places, for example in Bedfordshire, County Durham, Kent, Northumerland, and Northamptonshire, called Warden, from Old English weard ‘watch’ + dūn ‘hill’. Compare Wardlaw and Wardle 2.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Wardlaw was born in 1328, in Wilton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, his father, Henry Wardlaw, was 35 and his mother, Mary Stewart, was 11325. He married Margaret de Halkett in 1335, in Wilton, Roxburghshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. He died in 1398, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Wardlaw est né en 1328, à Wilton, Roxburghshire, Écosse, son père, Henry Wardlaw, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mary Stewart, avait 11325 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Halkett en 1335, à Wilton, Roxburghshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé en 1398, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Wardlaw 1328 in Wilton, Roxburghshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Wardlaw 35 und seine Mutter Mary Stewart 11325. Er hat 1335 in Wilton, Roxburghshire, Scotland Margaret de Halkett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb 1398 im Alter von 70 Jahren.

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Wardlaw(이)가 1328년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 윌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Wardlaw(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Stewart(은)는 11325세였다. 그는 1335년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 윌턴에서 Margaret de Halkett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1398년 70세의 나이로 사망했다.
